name: Pico Topia
short_description: A tiny citybuilder where you combine tiles to gather points and unlock new ... tiles!
detailed_description:
About

Tired of city building where you have to micromanage everything?

Pico Topia is a simple and relaxing citybuilder where you place tiny tiles, combine them to collect points and unlock new tiles.

Combining tiles will either increase or reduce your points. If you lose too many points, the game ends.

Leveling up

If you gain enough points, you will level up and unlock new islands that you can the place in your world.

Unlocking an island also gives you the chance to add it to your starter cards.

Starter Cards

When you beat your high score of your previous world, you will be able to unlock a starter card.

The first three cards you start a world with will be chosen from your starter card collection, making every start to a new world different.
